title: MSc. course on 'Data-driven Communication: Content Management & Visualization for Marketing and Communication Sciences'

yaml.title: MSc. course on 'Data-driven Communication: Content Management & Visualization for Marketing and Communication Sciences'

markdown.markdown:
::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-8}
Welcome to our course platform, designed to guide you through sessions and serve as a comprehensive repository for resources, including reading material, videos, and code. 

This course emphasizes practical, hands-on skills essential for transforming data into compelling visual stories tailored for marketing and communication. You will master the full technology stack—from survey creation tools like Google Forms to collaborative version control using GitHub, and R-based analytics with RStudio and Quarto for generating visually captivating dashboards. 

By the end of the course, you'll have the expertise to host interactive visualizations online, making insights accessible for real-world applications.

:::

::: {.g-col-4}
![](images/home3.png){.center width="70%" style="border-radius: 8px;"}
:::
:::


### Dr. Costas Tziouvas
Dr. Costas Tziouvas is a computer scientist and faculty member at the Cyprus University of Technology. He has extensive experience in data analytics and digital communication. You can reach him at [costas.tziouvas@cut.ac.cy](mailto:costas.tziouvas@cut.ac.cy).

### Dr. Fernando Mendez
Dr. Fernando Mendez, is a political scientist and researcher at the University of Zurich. His interests lie at the intersection of data science and political communication. You can reach him at [fernando.mendez@zda.uzh.ch](mailto:fernando.mendez@zda.uzh.ch).

## Course Outline

The course covers a range of topics, focusing on hands-on techniques for transforming data into visual narratives. More details about the course structure, modules, and learning objectives are available in the [Course Outline](https://digipols-admin.github.io/teaching_template/pages/outline.html).

::: {.footer style="text-align: left; padding: 1rem; margin-top: 10rem;"}
© 2025 Digipols. All rights reserved. | [Privacy Policy](#) | [Terms of Service](#)
:::
